name: ShaderToy-MCP
description: MCP Server for ShaderToy, connecting LLM like Claude with ShaderToy through Model Context Protocol (MCP), allowing the LLM to query and read the entire web page and generate complex shaders.

tools.name: get_shader_info
tools.description: Retrieve information on any shader on ShaderToy.

tools.name: search_shader
tools.description: Search for shaders available on ShaderToy through a search prompt.
